MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling.
Defendant Jeffrey N. Levinson dba Arrowsmith Design Group's Hearing on Claim Of Exemption
is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party (The Law Firm of Zwicker & Associates, P.C) Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove-Up Hearing;
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, America Express Bank, FSB: American Express Centurion Bank.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Jeffrey N. Levinson dba Arrowsmith Design Group.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Richard Kier on file.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $53,130.80
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $469.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $53,599.80
Judgment signed in open court.
